title: Ensure that notification is enabled on all high risk items

input_row.title: Ensure that notification is enabled on all high risk items
input_row.description: Enable all risk item notification in Vulnerability, Baseline Risks, Alerts and Accesskey Leak event detection categories.
input_row.rationale: To make sure that relevant security operators would receive notifications as soon as security events happens.
input_row.audit: Through the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click Notification. 4. Review notification settings and ensure all high-risk items are enabled.
input_row.remediation: Through the management console: 1. Logon to Security Center Console. 2. Select Settings. 3. Click Notification. 4. Enable all high-risk items on Notification setting.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** ali_security_center_notification_high_risk_items_enabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
1. **API Calls and CLI Commands:**
   - Use the Alibaba Cloud Security Center API to check the notification settings for high-risk items.
   - Use the Aliyun CLI command to retrieve the notification settings: `aliyun security-center DescribeNotificationSettings`
   - This command will return the current notification configuration for vulnerability scans, baseline risk assessments, alerts, and access key leakage detection.

2. **Resources to Enumerate:**
   - Security Center configurations across all regions.

3. **Configuration Properties/Settings to Validate:**
   - Ensure that notifications for all categories (Vulnerability, Baseline Risks, Alerts, Access Key Leak) are enabled.

4. **Pass/Fail Criteria:**
   - Pass: All high-risk item notifications are enabled.
   - Fail: Any of the high-risk item notifications (Vulnerability, Baseline Risks, Alerts, Access Key Leak) are not enabled.

5. **Example:**
   - Execute `aliyun security-center DescribeNotificationSettings` to verify if all high-risk item notifications are enabled and correctly configured as per compliance requirements.
